SEARCH
Package com.nib.supernaut.ctg

Class RestSupernautGateway

java.lang.Object
com.nib.supernaut.ctg.RestSupernautGateway
All Implemented Interfaces:
GatewayReturnCodes, ISupernautGateway
public class RestSupernautGateway extends Object implements ISupernautGateway
RestSupernautGateway implements the ISupernautGateway interface for communication with a CICS (Customer Information Control System) gateway via REST calls. It handles requests and responses for gateway transactions.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from interface com.nib.supernaut.ctg.GatewayReturnCodes

    astrGateway_Rc, ERROR_BASE, ERROR_CONNECTION_FAILED, ERROR_EXIT_RETRY_INVALID, ERROR_GATEWAY_BACK_LEVEL, ERROR_GATEWAY_CLOSED, ERROR_GATEWAY_EXCEPTION, ERROR_INVALID_REQUEST_TYPE, ERROR_NOT_AUTHORIZED, ERROR_NOT_SUPPORTED, ERROR_NULL_DATA, ERROR_REPLY_MISMATCH, ERROR_SECURITY_VIOLATION, ERROR_UNKNOWN_REQUEST_TYPE, ERROR_WORK_WAS_REFUSED, ERROR_XA_SUPPORT_NOT_ENABLED, strINVALID_GATEWAY_RC

  • Method Details

    • flow

      public int flow(ECIRequest eciRequest) throws IOException
      Executes the transaction flow for an ECI request. Resets the ECI request and then calls the protected _flow method for processing. Handles CtgFlowException by setting appropriate error codes in the request.
      Specified by:
      flow in interface ISupernautGateway
      Parameters:
      eciRequest - The ECIRequest object containing the request details.
      Returns:
      The gateway return code after flow processing.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs during processing.

    • _flow

      protected int _flow(ECIRequest req) throws com.nib.supernaut.ctg.CtgFlowException, IOException
      Executes the internal flow logic for sending the ECI request to the REST gateway. Builds a TransactionGatewayRequest, serializes it to JSON, sends it to the configured URI, and processes the TransactionGatewayResponse.
      Parameters:
      req - The ECIRequest object containing the request details.
      Returns:
      The gateway return code.
      Throws:
      com.nib.supernaut.ctg.CtgFlowException - If a CTG-specific flow error occurs.
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs during communication.

    • isOpen

      public boolean isOpen()
      Indicates whether the gateway is open and ready for communication. Currently, this method always returns false for RestSupernautGateway as REST connections are typically stateless and do not maintain an explicit "open" state like traditional socket connections.
      Specified by:
      isOpen in interface ISupernautGateway
      Returns:
      false always, as the REST gateway does not maintain an open connection.

    • close

      public void close()
      Closes resources associated with the gateway. For RestSupernautGateway, this method performs no operation as there are no explicit resources to close.
      Specified by:
      close in interface ISupernautGateway
